'''Bronnel''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].

==Biography==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Bronell accepted the bounty placed on a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] officer by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] for debts owed.
After capturing the officer, Bronell allowed the Alliance, Jabba, and a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] also owed money, to bid on the officer's life.

==Behind the scenes==
Bronell was a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by Sony Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on December 15, 2011.
